name: First Trust Intermediate Duration Preferred & Income Fund
summary: First Trust Intermediate Duration Preferred & Income Fund is a closed end fixed income mutual fund launched and managed by First Trust Advisors L.P. The fund is co-managed by Stonebridge Advisors, LLC. It invests in fixed income markets. The fund will also invest in below investment-grade securities like junk or high-yield securities. First Trust Intermediate Duration Preferred & Income Fund was formed on May 23, 2013 and is domiciled in the United States.
